reviews.review_description: This game is generally okay, however I do have a few things that the game can improve on. First thing, make it easier to move if you arent using controllers. If you have a small space to work with, then you can't move unless you either grab your controllers and move then set them down, or if you use the teleport thing. Also, set a limit as to where you can move with controllers active. If you use the joystick, you can glitch out of the map and instantly get to the end. One glitch that I had was when I tried to use it with hand tracking, I was put in the very back of where you spawn and couldn't really do anything without using the controllers. With that being said, however, this is just a quick game to show what hand tracking could do, and you can't fully fault the designers for all the flaws.
Ok im struggle with how cause there is a invisible wall and idk how to get past it

reviews.review_title: Felt like it was made in a day at most
reviews.review_description: This games only saving point was it looked good. But I couldn’t enjoy that cause you can just leave the map at any time. Any puzzle you don’t half to do cause you can just go to the end and beat it. Combat sucks cause the game try’s to teach you stuff to fight but you can just grab and throw enemies into the void. Even in the moss temple I found an enemy that I can’t pick up and even then I DIDNT NEED TO DO IT!!!! I just went past it and beat the level. And even the levels I did do felt like I push a button and wait for two stupid thing it stand somewhere. There also is four levels which is just so little. Overall I didn’t pay anything and I still want my money back cause that was so bad.
This game not only has fire ice and electricity powers, but it is a oculus made game and I really like it
I want to be able to activate all spells at once
Pretty fun but short and also very buggy. Still has potential
I love the mechanics the physics are so amazing also the force? amazing

I’m pretty sure that was just a demo, but if it wasn’t, I feel like it could be better, but if it was, I feel like that game has a good future in front of it

This isn’t a game but a showcase of how cool a game like this could actually be, and if they are in development of it then I can’t wait for it to launch!
Really enjoyed playing the game, but it definitely needs more levels!

reviews.review_title: Best hand tracking Game on quest
reviews.review_description: This is a crazy good game, the only thing that I don't like is that it feels so short.

It’s a really cool concept and it’s fun to play but I think it could use a level system, (progressively gets harder) so it’s not the same level every time, and maybe an online competing feature. Another idea, you collide level up to unlock new levels.

P.S I noticed some people didn’t know how to do the lightning spell, all you have to do is use hand tracking and point your index and middle finger forward, while your thumb is facing up. Then you just have to thrust forward.
The best game ever thank you
I started it up and then my Quest 2 froze right after the first message! Do not download unless you know how to fix it! Couldn't even restart it.

Dude one of the coolest games I ever seen before better than We Are The Ones I can’t wait to play your it will be so awesome and I never played a game like this you change my experience to vr thank you bro p.s. I love the god powers!

reviews.review_title: Really nice game with some good graphics
reviews.review_description: More content

I loaded the game, no clue where to go, the hand tracking was pretty on point, but there were no pop ups or details or guide on WTF to do.  I just poked around for a bit stuck on a level that I couldn't figure out how to exit the level I was on.  As I couldn't figure out what to do after I threw a bunch of monsters off the board, I gave up.  Needs a tutorial level to let entry level VR players get into the game.

It is so good because it has hand tracking and physics

This game was a great glimpse into where hand tracking going and the possibilities of gaming controller free!!! There were some bugs I noticed though but could be I needed better lighting in my room. Still was an amazing experience!

reviews.review_title: When is the game coming out?
reviews.review_description: This game has set the benchmark for me for controller free games and it's only the demo. I have honesty played this demo more times than I should have its that much fun. It's what black and white was for the PC. So when is the game available?

I love that this is an app lab game. The hand tracking is great, And with both hands and controllers, they do not go through objects like boneworks. It makes the game smoother. The powers are so fun to use. So download it for free and try it out

Idea and graphics are good. Hand tracking was not working so good for me. I feel like the devs are trying to do too much before perfecting the functions.  Hand tracking would fail depending on the angle of hands. When the camera loses sight of fingers due to bending wrist, it would not function. Would purchase if this got much better.
